name: Universal App Store
subtitle: One of the best app stores!

apps.name: Rewound
apps.subtitle: A customizable music player that brings classic iPod-style controls to modern iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: Rewound is an iOS music player app that lets users customize their playback experience with retro-inspired interfaces, including classic iPod click wheel controls. Compatible with iOS 11.0 and later, it works by integrating with the user’s existing music library and Apple Music playback while applying custom skins and control layouts. Designed for nostalgia and personalization, Rewound focuses on recreating the feel of older Apple music devices with modern functionality.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Rewound needs access to your library to get the media files.
privacy.NSAppleMusicUsageDescription: Rewound needs access to your music library to control your music.

apps.name: Angry Birds Star Wars II
apps.subtitle: A sequel Star Wars crossover with switchable characters and expanded abilities.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Star Wars II is a physics-based puzzle game developed by Rovio Entertainment in collaboration with Lucasfilm. It serves as a sequel to Angry Birds Star Wars and introduces a larger roster of playable characters from both the bird and pig sides, each with unique abilities inspired by the Star Wars universe. The game features the ability to switch characters mid-level using Telepods, along with expanded levels based on iconic Star Wars locations and storylines.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Taking pictures

apps.name: Angry Birds Star Wars HD
apps.subtitle: A high-resolution Star Wars crossover version of Angry Birds for tablets.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Star Wars HD is a tablet-optimized edition of Angry Birds Star Wars developed by Rovio Entertainment in collaboration with Lucasfilm. It features the same physics-based slingshot gameplay where players use Star Wars-inspired bird characters with unique abilities like lightsabers and Force powers. This HD version includes enhanced high-resolution graphics, improved textures, and visual upgrades designed for larger screens while keeping the original crossover gameplay intact.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Taking pictures

apps.name: Angry Birds Star Wars
apps.subtitle: A Star Wars crossover that blends Angry Birds gameplay with iconic sci-fi characters.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Star Wars is a physics-based puzzle game developed by Rovio Entertainment in collaboration with Lucasfilm. It combines classic slingshot gameplay with characters, locations, and abilities inspired by the Star Wars universe. Players control bird versions of Jedi, Sith, and other iconic characters, each with unique powers such as lightsaber attacks or Force abilities, across themed levels set on planets from the Star Wars saga.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Taking pictures

apps.name: Angry Birds Space HD
apps.subtitle: A high-resolution version of Angry Birds Space optimized for tablets.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Space HD is a tablet-optimized version of Angry Birds Space developed by Rovio Entertainment. It features the same gravity-based gameplay where players launch birds through space, using planetary gravity fields, orbits, and zero-gravity mechanics to solve puzzles. This HD edition includes enhanced high-resolution graphics, improved textures, and visual optimizations designed for larger screens while preserving the original space-themed gameplay experience.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Taking pictures

apps.name: Angry Birds Space
apps.subtitle: A gravity-based Angry Birds adventure set across space and planets.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Space is a physics-based puzzle game developed by Rovio Entertainment that introduces zero-gravity mechanics and planetary gravity fields. Players launch birds through space environments, using gravitational pulls from planets and asteroids to curve trajectories and solve puzzles. The game features new bird abilities, unique level mechanics, and space-themed worlds that add a strategic twist to the classic slingshot gameplay.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Taking pictures

apps.name: Angry Birds Seasons HD
apps.subtitle: A high-resolution version of Angry Birds Seasons with enhanced visuals for tablets.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Seasons HD is a tablet-optimized version of Angry Birds Seasons developed by Rovio Entertainment. It features the same seasonal, physics-based slingshot gameplay where players complete themed levels based on holidays and events such as Halloween, Christmas, and Valentine’s Day. This HD edition includes improved high-resolution graphics, sharper textures, and visual enhancements designed for larger screens while keeping the original gameplay experience intact.

apps.name: Angry Birds Seasons
apps.subtitle: A seasonal twist on classic slingshot gameplay with themed levels year-round.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Seasons is a physics-based puzzle game developed by Rovio Entertainment that expands the original Angry Birds formula with themed episodes based on real-world holidays and seasonal events. Players use a slingshot to launch birds at pig-built structures across levels inspired by celebrations like Halloween, Christmas, Valentine’s Day, and more. Each update introduces new mechanics, environments, and challenges tied to its seasonal theme.

apps.name: Angry Birds Rio HD
apps.subtitle: A high-resolution version of Angry Birds Rio optimized for tablets.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Rio HD is an enhanced, high-resolution edition of Angry Birds Rio designed for larger screens and tablet devices. Developed by Rovio Entertainment in collaboration with 20th Century Studios, it features the same physics-based slingshot gameplay as the original, where players rescue birds by breaking cages across tropical environments inspired by the Rio films. This HD version includes improved graphics, higher-resolution textures, and optimized visuals for modern devices while keeping the original gameplay intact.

privacy.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: This lets you add events to your calendar from the game.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: This lets the game use the camera for taking photos and videos.

apps.name: Angry Birds Rio
apps.subtitle: A movie-themed slingshot puzzle game set in the Rio universe.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Rio is a physics-based puzzle game developed by Rovio Entertainment in collaboration with 20th Century Studios. Based on the Rio film franchise, it features classic slingshot gameplay where players launch birds to break cages and defeat enemies across tropical environments. The game includes themed episodes, unique level mechanics, and boss encounters inspired by locations and characters from the Rio movies.

privacy.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: This lets you add events to your calendar from the game.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: This lets the game use the camera for taking photos and videos.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This lets the game access your photos and add screenshots to your Camera Roll.

apps.name: Angry Birds Classic HD
apps.subtitle: A high-resolution version of the original Angry Birds with enhanced visuals for tablets.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Classic HD is an enhanced version of the original physics-based slingshot puzzle game designed for larger screens and higher-resolution displays. Developed by Rovio Entertainment, it features the same core gameplay as Angry Birds Classic—where players launch birds to destroy structures and defeat pigs—while offering improved graphics, sharper textures, and optimized visuals for tablets and modern devices.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Taking pictures

apps.name: Angry Birds GO!
apps.subtitle: A fast-paced kart racing game set in the Angry Birds universe.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds GO! is a 3D kart racing game where players race as characters from the Angry Birds universe on dynamic tracks filled with shortcuts, ramps, and hazards. Developed by Rovio Entertainment, the game features vehicle upgrades, character abilities, multiple race modes, and a progression system where players unlock new racers and karts. It combines arcade-style racing with familiar Angry Birds characters and environments.

privacy.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Angry Birds Go! would like to use bluetooth.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Angry Birds Go! would like to use the microphone.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Taking pictures

apps.name: Angry Birds Epic
apps.subtitle: A turn-based RPG adventure set in the Angry Birds universe.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Epic is a turn-based role-playing game where players assemble a team of birds to battle pigs across fantasy-themed islands. Developed by Rovio Entertainment, it features strategic combat, character progression, crafting systems, and gear upgrades instead of traditional slingshot gameplay. Players take turns in battles, using unique abilities and equipment to defeat enemies and progress through a story-driven campaign.

apps.name: Angry Birds Classic
apps.subtitle: The original physics-based slingshot game that started the Angry Birds series.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Classic is a physics-based puzzle game where players use a slingshot to launch birds at structures built by pigs in order to defeat them. Developed by Rovio Entertainment, it features progressively challenging levels, unique bird abilities, and destructible environments that reward precision and strategy. The game became one of the most iconic mobile titles of all time and helped define the early era of mobile gaming.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Taking pictures

apps.name: Geometry Dash
apps.subtitle: Free Geometry Dash
apps.localizedDescription: The paid version of Geometry Dash but for free.

apps.name: Geode
apps.subtitle: A modern mod loader for Geometry Dash with powerful customization support.
apps.localizedDescription: Geode is an open-source modding framework for Geometry Dash that allows users to install and manage gameplay mods, plugins, and extensions directly on supported versions of the game. Compatible with Geometry Dash 2.2+ (platform support varies by build), it provides a unified system for loading mods, customizing gameplay features, and enhancing the game experience without manual patching. Designed for the Geometry Dash modding community, Geode simplifies mod installation and enables a stable ecosystem for community-created extensions.

privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: A mod you are using is requesting this permission.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: A mod you are using is requesting this permission.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: This permission is needed for accessing the JIT server.

apps.name: HD Flix
apps.subtitle: A media browsing app for organizing and accessing video content sources.
apps.localizedDescription: HD Flix is a third-party iOS application designed for browsing and organizing video and media content from user-provided or external sources. Compatible with iOS 14.0 and later, it offers a simple interface for managing playlists, catalogs, and streaming links depending on configuration. The app is distributed outside the App Store and is intended for general media access use cases where content sources are supplied by the user or external services.

privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: The application needs access to the microphone to recognize your voice to convert voice to title of the journey.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: The application needs access to the photo library to create the journey.
privacy.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: The application needs access to speech recognition to convert your voice to title of the journey.
privacy.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: This identifier will be used to deliver personalized ads to you.

apps.name: ESign
apps.subtitle: Sign and install IPA files directly on iPhone or iPad.
apps.localizedDescription: ESign is an iOS sideloading utility that allows users to import, sign, and install IPA files directly on their device using certificates or provisioning profiles. Compatible with iOS 14.0 and later, it includes file management tools, app signing features, and installation options for third-party or modified apps without requiring a computer. Designed for advanced users and sideloading workflows, ESign provides a convenient way to manage and deploy iOS applications directly from the device.

apps.name: PostBox
apps.subtitle: A jailbreak and iOS tweak news client for tracking repos, tools, and updates.
apps.localizedDescription: PostBox is an iOS application focused on jailbreak and sideloading news, providing updates about tools, tweaks, repositories, and community releases. Available through postbox.news, it acts as a centralized feed for jailbreak-related content, announcements, and downloads. Designed for enthusiasts in the iOS customization and sideloading community, PostBox helps users stay updated with the latest developments in jailbreak tools, IPA releases, and related projects.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Please allow PostBox to save media into your photo library.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PostBox can save media (such as screenshots and banners) to your photo library.

apps.name: EnsWilde
apps.subtitle: Advanced iOS customization and system utility tools for supported devices.
apps.localizedDescription: EnsWilde is an advanced iOS utility focused on system customization and device management features for supported iOS versions. Compatible with iOS 15.0 and later (varies by build), it provides tools for modifying certain system behaviors, managing device configurations, and applying custom tweaks without requiring a full jailbreak. Designed for power users and developers, EnsWilde streamlines advanced iOS workflows through an on-device interface while maintaining compatibility with modern iOS security restrictions.

apps.name: FilzaJailedDS
apps.subtitle: Browse, manage, and organize files on iOS without a jailbreak.
apps.localizedDescription: FilzaJailedDS is a modified version of the popular Filza file manager designed to run on non-jailbroken iOS devices. Compatible with iOS 14.0 and later, it provides access to app containers, documents, downloads, and other user-accessible directories through a powerful file management interface. Featuring file editing, archive support, media previews, and file transfer tools, FilzaJailedDS brings many of the capabilities of a traditional iOS file manager to sideloaded environments without requiring full system access.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: To save photos and videos to photo library.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: To save photos and videos to photo library.
privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Filza uses Face ID to authenticate

apps.name: Pocket Poster
apps.subtitle: Create and apply custom animated posters and lock screen experiences on iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: Pocket Poster is an iOS customization tool that allows users to create, import, and manage custom PosterBoard content, animated wallpapers, and personalized lock screen experiences. Compatible with iOS 16.0 and later on supported devices, it works alongside modern customization tools to bring unique visual effects and interactive designs to your device without requiring a traditional jailbreak. Designed for customization enthusiasts, Pocket Poster makes it easy to personalize your iPhone with custom posters, animations, and creative lock screen content.

apps.name: iTorrent
apps.subtitle: Download, manage, and share torrents directly on your iPhone or iPad.
apps.localizedDescription: iTorrent is an open-source BitTorrent client for iOS that allows users to download and manage torrent files and magnet links directly from their device. Compatible with iOS 11.0 and later, it includes support for background downloading, file management, media previewing, seeding, and file sharing through a native iOS interface. Designed for both casual and advanced users, iTorrent brings a full-featured torrent experience to iPhone and iPad without requiring a jailbreak.

apps.name: StikDebug
apps.subtitle: Enable JIT and access powerful debugging tools directly on iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: StikDebug is an advanced iOS developer utility that provides tools for enabling JIT compilation, viewing device logs, inspecting running processes, managing provisioning profiles, and troubleshooting sideloaded applications. Compatible with iOS 14.0 and later, it is designed for developers, emulator users, and power users who need greater visibility and control over their apps. With a focus on on-device debugging and diagnostics, StikDebug helps streamline development and testing workflows without requiring a jailbreak.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: StikDebug needs access to devices on your local network so it can connect to the targets you add to the Device Library.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: StikDebug uses location to stay running in the background and maintain your JIT connection.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: StikDebug uses location to stay running in the background and maintain your JIT connection.

apps.name: Feather
apps.subtitle: A modern and lightweight app for signing and installing IPA files on iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: Feather is an open-source iOS sideloading utility that allows users to sign, install, and manage IPA files directly on their device using certificates and provisioning profiles. Compatible with iOS 15.0 and later, it features a modern interface, certificate management, app library organization, and support for importing apps from local files or online sources. Designed for both casual users and advanced sideloading enthusiasts, Feather provides a streamlined way to install and maintain third-party apps without requiring a jailbreak.

apps.name: SideStore
apps.subtitle: Install and refresh sideloaded apps without a computer or jailbreak.
apps.localizedDescription: SideStore is an open-source iOS sideloading platform that allows users to install, manage, and refresh IPA files directly on their device using their own Apple ID. Compatible with iOS 14.0 and later, it builds upon the AltStore ecosystem while enabling app refreshes over Wi-Fi without requiring a constant connection to a computer. Designed for developers, testers, and enthusiasts, SideStore provides a convenient way to run third-party apps while staying within Apple's standard device restrictions.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: SideStore uses the local network to find and communicate with your device.

apps.name: Ksign
apps.subtitle: Sign and install IPA files directly on your iPhone or iPad.
apps.localizedDescription: Ksign is an iOS sideloading utility that allows users to sign, install, and manage IPA files directly on their device using certificates and provisioning profiles. Compatible with iOS 14.0 and later, it provides an easy-to-use interface for importing apps, applying signatures, and installing them without requiring a computer. Popular among sideloading enthusiasts, Ksign simplifies app management and makes it easier to deploy custom, development, and third-party applications on supported iOS devices.

apps.name: LiveContainer
apps.subtitle: Run multiple sideloaded iOS apps inside a single container environment.
apps.localizedDescription: LiveContainer is an open-source iOS utility that allows users to run and manage multiple sideloaded applications inside a single host container app. Compatible with iOS 14.0 and later, it helps bypass the standard app limit imposed by iOS sideloading methods by consolidating apps into one environment. Designed for developers and advanced users, it provides a flexible way to organize, launch, and test IPA-based applications without requiring a jailbreak.

apps.name: UTM
apps.subtitle: Run Windows, Linux, and other operating systems on iPhone, iPad, and Mac.
apps.localizedDescription: UTM is a virtualization and emulation app for iOS, iPadOS, and macOS that lets users run full desktop operating systems such as Windows, Linux, and macOS in isolated virtual machines. Compatible with iOS 14.0 and later, it is built on QEMU and supports both emulation (for different CPU architectures) and virtualization on supported devices for improved performance. It is widely used for development, testing, and educational purposes, allowing users to experiment with different operating systems directly on Apple devices without modifying the system or requiring a jailbreak.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: The virtual machine may access the local network. UTM may also use the network to communicate with local servers.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: UTM requests location data periodically to ensure the system keeps the background process active. Location data will never leave the device.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: UTM requests location data periodically to ensure the system keeps the background process active. Location data will never leave the device.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: UTM requests location data periodically to ensure the system keeps the background process active. Location data will never leave the device.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Permission is required for any virtual machine to record from the microphone.

apps.name: UTM SE
apps.subtitle: Run virtual machines on iPhone and iPad without JIT support.
apps.localizedDescription: UTM SE (Slow Edition) is a lightweight version of UTM designed for iOS and iPadOS devices that do not support JIT. Compatible with iOS 14.0 and later, it allows users to run virtual machines using QEMU-based software emulation to launch operating systems like Linux and Windows. While performance is reduced compared to full UTM builds, it provides a convenient way to use desktop environments on mobile devices without requiring jailbreak or JIT-enabled tools.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: The virtual machine may access the local network. UTM may also use the network to communicate with local servers.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Permission is required for any virtual machine to record from the microphone.

apps.name: OldOS
apps.subtitle: A fully interactive recreation of classic iOS for modern iPhones and iPads.
apps.localizedDescription: OldOS is a nostalgia-focused iOS application that recreates the look, feel, and interactions of early iPhone OS (iOS 1–4 era) on modern devices. It simulates the original home screen, system apps, animations, and UI behavior in a sandboxed environment. Compatible with iOS 14.0 and later, OldOS is designed as an educational and tribute project that lets users experience early iOS history without modifying their device system or requiring a jailbreak.

privacy.NSAppleMusicUsageDescription: To view, play, and experience your music in OldOS, please enable access to your music library.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: To take photos in OldOS, please enable access to your camera.
privacy.NSContactsUsageDescription: To view and manage your contacts in OldOS, please enable access to your contacts list.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: To enable maps to work properly, and see your current wifi network in Settings, please enable access to your location. Then close and re-open the Maps app.

privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: To enable maps to work properly, and see your current wifi network in Settings, please enable access to your location. Then close and re-open the Maps app.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: To record your audio while filming a video in OldOS, please in enable microphone access.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: To view, manage, and add photos to your photo library in OldOS, please enable access. Then close and re-open the Photos app.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: To view, manage, and add photos to your photo library in OldOS, please enable access. Then close and re-open the Photos app.

apps.name: Fortnite - EZFN
apps.subtitle: Relive classic Fortnite seasons with OG gameplay on custom servers.
apps.localizedDescription: Fortnite – EZFN is an unofficial community project that recreates older versions of Fortnite, allowing players to experience classic Chapter 1 seasons, maps, and mechanics through private servers. It uses EZFN accounts instead of Epic Games accounts and is designed for nostalgia and experimental gameplay. Compatible with PC and mobile builds depending on the release, it is not affiliated with Epic Games and operates separately from the official Fortnite servers.

privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Fortnite needs microphone access for voice chat.
